overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy night in the historic city of Saint Denis. The character passes by buildings with iron balconies, horse riders, and approaches a large columned mansion while street lamps illuminate the wet cobblestone streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with balconies and park benches

events.description: horse and rider trot past from right to left on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-soaked cobblestone street, passing under street lamps

notable_agents.action: horse and rider moving quickly past the character from right to left

entered.detail: row of two-story buildings with iron balconies and warm lit windows
line of trees with wooden benches underneath along the sidewalk
tall cast-iron street lamp illuminating the rainy street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rainy historic street at night, with balconied buildings on the left and a tree-lined park on the right. A horse and rider pass by in the opposite direction under the glow of street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to residential area with large mansion ahead

events.description: second horse and rider pass by from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward a large illuminated mansion visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: two figures sitting on a porch watching the rainy street

entered.detail: grand historic mansion with tall white columns and wrap-around balcony
black wrought-iron fence lining the mansion property

segments.scene_description: Passing seated figures on a porch, the character approaches a grand columned mansion ahead. Another horse rider passes by as the street opens up toward the large estate with its iron fence boundary.

scene_state.functional_zone: alongside historic mansion with columned entrance

events.description: slight turn to the right while passing the mansion entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past the columned porch of the mansion, moving deeper into the historic district

entered.detail: covered entrance with tall columns and glowing warm interior lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the grand mansion, passing its columned entrance with warm lights glowing from within. The street opens up as the historic buildings give way to the estate grounds, with rain continuing to fall under the street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy night in a historic city, transitioning from a narrow street lined with balconied buildings to the expansive grounds of a grand estate. It begins with the character walking past glowing street lamps and a tree-lined park as a horse and rider pass in the opposite direction. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up past seated figures on a porch, leading toward a large mansion enclosed by an iron fence. The camera then glides alongside the estate, passing a columned entrance with warm interior lights glowing through the rain. Finally, the historic city architecture gives way entirely to the open grounds of the mansion under the persistent fall of rain and the dim light of the street lamps.
